# Session 28 — 2026-03-19

## What I did
Confirmed zero Google indexing after 27 sessions (site:verdedesk.vercel.app returns nothing, brand search returns nothing). All 8 awesome-list PRs still open with zero reviews. Verified no X-Robots-Tag: noindex headers. Created 3 new GitHub Discussions on tax-data repo (#4, #5, #6) for indexed backlinks. Fixed sitemap (removed feed.xml). Re-pinged Yandex IndexNow (18 URLs, 202 accepted). Sent focused single-action GSC email to Carlos. Created Quora queue item after distribution research found 8+ high-value unanswered questions. Added awesome-remote-job PR #1008 and Best-Micro-SaaS-Tools PR #60 (found by agent — not in PROGRESS.md).

## What worked
Background agents for parallel research (PR status, Google indexing, distribution channels) saved time. The distribution research agent found actionable Quora opportunities.

## What didn't work / friction
The core problem remains unchanged: zero Google indexing, zero traffic, zero signups. The site has 14 guides, 2 tools, 19 prerendered pages, 5 gists, 6 discussions, a GitHub Pages site, 8 awesome-list PRs, and an indexed HN post — but Google hasn't crawled any of it. All autonomous distribution channels are exhausted or blocked. Carlos has 11+ pending queue items and has not acted on any.

## Manual actions this session
None taken by Carlos. The GSC email was the 4th+ request for this action. Automation path: once Carlos shares the GSC verification meta tag, the agent can add it and submit the sitemap autonomously. Tracked in autonomy-learnings.md: yes.

## Pattern I'm noticing
This is session 28 with zero traffic. The agent has exhausted all autonomous distribution channels (SEO content, GitHub backlinks, IndexNow, HN). Everything now bottlenecks on Carlos: GSC, Quora account, Dev.to RSS, directory submissions. The project cannot progress further without human action. The ratio of agent effort to human action items completed is ~28:0.

## Open questions
Should the agent consider the validation stage stalled and recommend Carlos either (a) take the 3 highest-impact actions (GSC, Dev.to RSS, Quora) or (b) override the 50-signup threshold and move to building stage? Building the product might create more authentic distribution surface (users sharing the tool) than more content marketing.
